entry.title: Re: HOW TO GET NOTIFICATION IN MY INBOX FIORI APP WHEN PA...
entry.content:
Hi MED10,

In SBWP and in "My Inbox" your are going to recieve  workitem notifications only. So, you can't receive  and email notification.

 

Best regards

 

JCD

entry.title: Re: Unable to export SAP Build Apps source (.gpg)
entry.content: Sorry for the delay. This export issue will be fixed in the release next week.

entry.title: Re: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content: Hello - this is in our production system and we're using Employee Central as our primary HR system. I'm looking at an example HR sent where you can see the pay grade change in Manage Data > Job Classifcation but the EC Job Information still shows the old paygrade. The import changed the pay grade in Job Classifcation to a P11 but Job Information in EC on the employee sill shows P10.

entry.title: Control records for actual CCS missing for valuation area 1710.
entry.content:
hello,

i am trying to create the accounting view of new material via mm01 but system is showing me below error in CoCd 1710, Plant 1710.

if i am trying to save it without any Accounting view then system is letting me save it without any error.

otherwise below error is shown;

please note that the valuation area is already active in the system as per attached images.

"Control records for actual CCS missing for valuation area 1710."

Message No. ML4HMASTER229

Diagnosis

The system detected missing control records for the actual cost component split in database tables CKMLKEV or CKMLKEVLD. Usually, such missing control records indicate that you activated the actual cost component split for the valuation area but have not yet run the startup program for the actual cost component split. However, the control records could also be missing due to errors in the period shift program (transaction MMPV).

System Response

You cannot make any postings for the valuation area before the missing control records have been generated.

Procedure

If the control records for the actual cost component split are missing because you subsequently activated the actual cost component split for the given valuation area without running the startup report FCML4H_CCS_STARTUP, then please execute the report FCML4H_CCS_STARTUP now. Once all relevant materials and activity types of the valuation area have been processed successfully in update mode by the program (check the message log!), the missing control records in table CKMLKEV or CKMLKEVLD will be generated.

If you did not subsequently activate the actual cost component split for the given valuation area, then please do not execute the report FCML4H_CCS_STARTUP but get in contact with SAP support!

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello @Tshepo_Dongo - you might get better support in the Technology Q&A section of our site. Maybe someone has already posted a similar question, if not - you can post your question there. 

I hope you find what you are looking for.

You might also consider joining our SAP Learning group.

entry.title: Re: New Member - Hello from Shubham
entry.content: Thanks for the suggestion! I've just joined the Gurugram group, looking forward to connecting with folks and joining upcoming events.

entry.title: Include Header row in subsequent pages is not working for adobe header repetition issue
entry.content:
In Adobe form, I have created table with header but header is visible only on first page, it’s not visible from second page

I tried below suggested solutions:

1.The table is inserted into a subform with Flowed content & allow page break within content.

2.Select the Header Row and in Pagination tab select the check box Include Header row in initial page & Include Header row in subsequent pages

3.Select the Header Row and in Binding tab select the check box Repeat Row for Each Data Item and give Min Count as 1.

entry.title: Re: Set story filters api based on input control
entry.content:
hi @Freddie, weird. works for me.

console.log("Page_1 - onInitialization");
tblplan = Table_1;
StoryPopup_1.open();

entry.title: automatic assignment of Support Team to incident in solution manager 7.2
entry.content:
how to set up the automatic assignment of support team to incident in solution manager. out team did some changes in ZMIN_STD & SLFN0003_ADVANCED to send the mail to support team, before this the system is able to assign the support team to incident, but now it is not happening.

can any one help me on this how to get the support team automatically

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to use se38 report in SAP public cloud?
entry.content: Try transaction SA38 - Reporting.

entry.title: Re: how to default cost center to a FS item
entry.content:
Hello,

With the current task to calculate the Net Income it is not possible to keep the cost center value or to default a value for this field. This means that the cost center is empty. This is generally ok since the net income FS items (on B/S, on P&L) do not require such cost center breakdown. If you need the net income by cost centers, you can get this in the group reports by filtering the corresponding hierarchy node and a drilldown by cost center.

With the new Rules for Automatic Postings it will be possible to keep any fields value during the calculation of the net income, and also to assign a value for this field.

See https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?BC=6EAE8B27FCC11ED892E919ED096400CC&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=F9D8FE25955B1EEEAD8994731533A76B

Hope this helps.

Best regards,

Grégoire

entry.title: Re: How to separate the string for a query column custom name into two lines?
entry.content: Hi. Not sure if I got it. Do you want to have "Document" as header and "Number" as the first query result?

entry.title: IBP Location Substitution in Order based planning heuristics
entry.content:
Hi All

We have an ask from client where , for a product P1 at location L1, if demand is created, the OBP heuristics should check stock at L1, if not available, check in L2 and so on. If no stock in the chain, it has to mark the demand as unfulfilled at L1. 

This is like location substitution instead of product substitution (which is standard). Is this supported in OBP heuristics . Appreciate any quick response. TIA

 

GP

entry.title: Re: How to separate the string for a query column custom name into two lines?
entry.content:
@Felipe_Lima

No. I want only the title to be displayed in two lines without that affecting the results. Only the column title which is changed to this string to appear on 2 (or more) lines. So if it's a long name the whole column doesn't auto-format to immediately take up half the screen because of that long name. 

 

to become:

entry.title: Re: Join our next Espresso Session on SAP Wipro sto360
entry.content:
Hi Kapil,

Of course, please use the above-mentioned link and register. The link will lead you to the recording. 

Best regards, 
Oxana

entry.title: Re: Create Business Partner via API class CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN
entry.content:
Just in case, you receive the error R11 243 during validation or creation, then the following SAP note might be helpful:

3109298 - Error: “Internal error when calling operation module BUA_CHECK_ADDRESS_VALIDITY_ALL; a check table is missing” while creating the first address to the existing Business Partner using the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER 

According to the note you need to explicitly mark the address as the default in the substructure of type BUS_EI_BUPA_ADDRESSUSAGE

data_key-addresstype = 'XXDEFAULT'
data-standard = abap_true

The example above does not hand over those information. Simply passing the operation = 'XXDFLT' is not sufficient.

Great blog anyways, regards!

entry.title: Re: SAP Roadmap available in CALM but not in Roadmap Viewer?
entry.content: Mariia Konikova confirms the roadmap she suggested is the correct one. Accepting this as solution.

entry.title: how the guaranteed value is calculating in the lc transaction when it is assigned to sales order
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone tell me how the LC guaranteed value is calculating in the LC transaction when it is assigned to the sales order. Below is an example for the better understanding:

1. Created sales order with qty-30000 with the net price of 2451300 usd

2. An LC is assigned to this sales order and the same so has been updated in the LC

How the Guaranteed value is showing 2454300 even though we have an LC coverage 2916144 with 12% tolerance.

Thanks,

Govardhan.

entry.title: When an employee is terminated and again rehired,the old termination record cannot be seen in pa20.
entry.content:
When an employee is terminated and again rehired, the old termination record cannot be seen in the system.

We want the termination action to be reflected in pa20.

Action type -13 is the termination action. Do we need to add anything here.. Can someone help us on this

entry.title: Re: How to release the profit specific material stock tha...
entry.content:
Hello,

The profit in the inventory that is eliminated in the period is released, by default, in the next period because the document type used for the elimination (2J in the SAP delivered content) is defined with auto reversal (also in the next year). With this, unless you report again internal inventory values in the new period, the profit eliminated in the previous period is not eliminated (i.e. is released) in the new period.

Hope this helps.

Best regards,

Grégoire

entry.title: Re: Bin, Trolley Tracking
entry.content:
May be you can start with looking at Empties Management - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/7b24a64d9d0941bda1afa753263d9e39/dc75b65334e6b54ce10000000a174cb4.html

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Route is assigning automatically to sales order
entry.content: Thanks @Stanislaw_Stefanowski for the solution.

entry.title: Re: Allow change in Notification Type after created
entry.content:
In the Customizing (SPRO) documentation explains that

  • When changing notifications, you can only change the notification type under the following conditions:
    • The change is explicitly allowed by the Customizing table.
    • The notification still has the status 'Outstanding'.
    • The original notification type has the origin "General notification".

entry.title: Re: Value help (Business Partner) in Custom Business Obje...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Only a few standard business objects like Company Code, Profit Center, Segment etc. are available as pre-defined value help options when creating a Custom Business Object.

However you can create Custom value help options: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/93f6abd65d754b38b259ca6ae23f69e9.html 

  • You can create your own custom value help by creating a Custom Business Object and associating it with your current Custom BO.
  • You can create a Custom CDS View with the "Value Help" option to provide value help for Custom BO fields.
  • Steps to create a custom value help:
    • Create a Custom Business Object to hold the value help data.
    • Ensure the "Can Be Associated" option is checked for this Custom BO.
    • Create a Custom CDS View using the Custom CDS Views app, selecting the Value Help scenario.
    • Use the associated Custom BO view as the Primary Data Source in the Custom CDS View.
    • In your main Custom BO, create a field with type "Association to Business Object" and select your custom value help BO.

Please check the following that has similar question and solutions, if this helps:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/association-to-business-object/qaq-p/12370774/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/association-to-business-object/qaq-p/12370774
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/custom-business-object-with-standar-help-values/qaq-p/12359843/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/custom-business-object-with-standar-help-values/qaq-p/12359843
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/can-we-create-custom-cds-value-help-with-combination-of-cbo-and-standard/qaq-p/12500596/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/can-we-create-custom-cds-value-help-with-combination-of-cbo-and-standard/qaq-p/12500596

 

Best Regards, 

Harish Mangtani

entry.title: Flexible Upload of Reported Financial Data
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Is there a way to run Flexible Upload of Reported Financial Data (Transaction: FINCS_UPL_EXEC) in the background?
We receive flat files from reporting entities (CUs) via file/interface and want to load en-masse.


We recently upgraded from SAP ECC version SAP ECC 6.0 EHP08 to S/4HANA 2023 FP01.

Previously, the transaction was run with Program FICUPL90 and transaction CX3FY.

I saw a reference that the following program and backend report could be used:
RGUUPLOAD_FLEXIBLE
backend report. RGUUPLOAD_FLEXIBLE

I checked the app: Schedule Jobs for Consolidation Tasks and the flexible upload was not available there.

Thanks in advance.
Eyal

entry.title: Sales Order Line-Level MRP Recommendations - SAPB1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have received a requirement from our client regarding the MRP order recommendation process. The client would like MRP recommendations—specifically Purchase Requests (PR) or Purchase Orders (PO) to reflect child part requirements on a per-sales-order-line basis, rather than consolidating demand across multiple sales order lines.

Example Scenario:

In a sales order (SO123) with two line items for the same parent material, where the BOM contains a common child item:

Current behavior: MRP consolidates the total child part requirement (e.g., 30 units for RM1001) and generates a single PR or PO.

Client requirement: MRP should generate two separate recommendations (e.g., 20 units for RM1001/SO123/Line 001 and 10 units for RM1001/SO123/Line 002), maintaining clear traceability to each sales order line.

Thanks!!!

entry.title: Flexible Upload of Reported Financial Data
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Is there a way to run Flexible Upload of Reported Financial Data (Transaction: FINCS_UPL_EXEC) in the background?
We receive flat files from reporting entities (CUs) via file/interface and want to load en-masse.


We recently upgraded from SAP ECC version SAP ECC 6.0 EHP08 to S/4HANA 2023 FP01.

Previously, the transaction was run with Program FICUPL90 and transaction CX3FY.

I saw a reference that the following program and backend report could be used:
RGUUPLOAD_FLEXIBLE
backend report. RGUUPLOAD_FLEXIBLE

I checked the app: Schedule Jobs for Consolidation Tasks and the flexible upload was not available there.

Thanks in advance.
Eyal

entry.title: Re: Negative values allowed in OAYZ is grayed out
entry.content: I have done all that, but the greyed out area is still there. As per the documentation, this setting will conflict with depreciation areas used for areas with negative values, like investment support. However, as far as I can see, this is not the case. My question is for S/4 HANA. Thanks,

entry.title: Re: sync connection script (SQL Anywhere)
entry.content:
Instead of an event (which by design runs as a separate connection), you can suppy a "login procedure" to enforce additional logic via the connection process, s. the login_procedure database option. Please note that you usually should call the default dbo.sp_login_environment() procedure from your custom one.

I have never used a login procedure to delay logins but a WAITFOR DELAY should work within the procedure's body (or whatever you want to check for). A caveat: I'm not sure how this option affects connection pooling, and how web services will react when their connecting is delayed that much...

entry.title: Re: Mass change to project fiori App
entry.content: Most GUI transactions are still available to run in Fiori, they run just like they did in GUI.. The true "Fiori" apps have been rewritten from ECC.

entry.title: Re: How to get list of model versions information in Powe...
entry.content: Hello, you can use following code: For each cho in subObject.ChildObjects output "-------------------------------" output cho.name output cho.ShortDescription output cho.ClassID Next ChildObjects collections contains all other model objects (tables, views, etc.) but you can find information about attached definition file. You can use information in the ShortDescription or ClassID properties. You can go with "Target model reference ..." or "Shortcut..." and make some further filtering. It is not optimal but it is the best you can do without checking out the model from repository. HTH, Ondrej Divis

entry.title: Re: How to get list of model versions information in Powe...
entry.content: Comments here have awful formatting... Posting my answer as a separate answer.

entry.title: Re: When an employee is terminated and again rehired,the...

entry.title: Re: How to get list of model versions information in Powe...
entry.content:
Hello Hongjiang,

you can use following code:

For each cho in subObject.ChildObjects
output "-------------------------------"
output cho.name
output cho.ShortDescription
output cho.ClassID
Next

ChhildObjects collections contains all other model objects (tables, views, etc.) but you can find information about attached definition file. You can use information in the ShortDescription or ClassID properties. You can go with "Target model reference ..." or "Shortcut..." and make some further filtering. It is not optimal but it is the best you can do without checking out the model from repository.

HTH,
Ondrej Divis

entry.title: ONB 1.0 Reminder Notification Recipients
entry.content: One of our recruiters has raised an issue that she is receiving Reminder emails for onboarding activities (original notification sent to Hiring Manager). I am thinking this was a request at implementation for the recruiters to gently remind Hiring Managers of their tasks. I cannot find where this is configured. I have checked recipients for the notification email, and the only option selected there is notification type = Hiring Manager Notification. Can someone please guide me to other places I can look for this configuration?

entry.title: Re: How do setup IAS login page for Onboardee and SSO pag...
entry.content:
Hi @dyaryura @Soma5 

Thank you for the solution. I was able to partially achieve the requirement. However, I’ve noticed two issues related to this.

Configuration added

1) Added below code in Target system.

  {

                "targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User']['targetUrl']",

                "constant": https://xxxxxxx.accounts.cloud.sap/saml2/idp/sso?sp=https://www.successfactors.com/xxxxxx&idp=https://xxxxx.accounts.ondemand.com",

                "scope": "createEntity"

            },

There is two issue i have noticed.

  • I’ve added the code you provided, but the account activation email is still displaying the Home page URL instead of the non-SSO URL configured in the code above.
  • When the onboardee clicks the account activation link, they are not prompted to set a password. Instead, they are redirected directly to the SuccessFactors home page, which prevents them from logging into the system later.

ONB-Account activation email template code

<h1 style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;font-weight: bold;font-size: 20px;color: #555;margin-bottom: 24px">Dear ${user.firstName?html} ${user.lastName?html},</h1>

<p style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;font-size: 14px;line-height: 18px">An account has been created for you. To activate your account for <#if user.target_url??><a href="${user.target_url}">${user.sp_name}</a><#else>${user.sp_name}</#if>, click the link below. You will be taken to a page where you will also set a password for your account.</p>

Do you think any changes are required in the email template or in the code?

entry.title: Re: What is a semantic tag? in detail
entry.content:
Dear user,

I’ll try to rephrase what’s it’s been written in the SAP Help documentation and bring some extra explanations which, I hope, will be clearer for you.

 

Semantic tags are basically a way to tell SAP what each part of your Financial Statement Version (FSV) actually means in business terms. You’re saying:
“This section is revenue,” or “That account is for fixed assets,” regardless of your local account structure or naming.

They're especially useful when you're working with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) or Group Reporting because those tools need a consistent way to understand financial data and they rely on these tags to do that.

They don’t change your data. They don’t trigger postings.
All they do is label accounts or FSV nodes with standard business meanings so SAP knows how to treat them behind the scenes.

For example:

- You assign FPA1_REVENUE to your sales accounts.

- You assign FPA1_COGS to your cost of sales accounts.

- When SAC or Group Reporting pulls data, they know which accounts to use in the income statement.

Without semantic tags, SAP wouldn’t know that your account 400000 means “Revenue” — and your data wouldn’t show up correctly in planning models, reports, or consolidation views.

 

I hope those elements will help you understand more about semantic tags.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hi @AlexanderRother ,

Thanks for this. Could you please share some updates on the Transform strategy planned for 2025 stated below by you.

Transform: The transformation of customer and partner code from the classic ERP towards SAP S/4HANA and further towards a clean core is one of the major challenges for many of our customers. We will assist with generative AI in this endeavor starting later in 2025.

Is there any roadmap available for us to check on what will be available as part of this ?

Thanks.

entry.title: the APIs for the Production Order component
entry.content:
Hi ,

the Business Scenario: 

The Production Order item is A . The component of Production Order  is  B and C.

I want to add a product D to the component of Production Order . And I want to add a by-product E to the component of Production Order .

But I find that there is no creat APIs for Production Order Component . It just have Read & Update & Delete for Production Order Component .

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/6d8ed32613654bd488e6d31a6ad3a96e.html?locale=en-US&q=create+Production+Order+Item

entry.title: Re: Getting Payload in CAP NodeJS REST Service Action

entry.title: Re: SAP Comunity Meetup in Recife 2025
entry.content:
E assim foi o nosso segundo SAP Meetup. Foi logo após o evento principal que reuniu a comunidade SAP de Recife, tivemos a oportunidade de prolongar a festa, fortalecer conexões e celebrar o crescimento desse grupo tão engajado.
A melhor parte? Pessoas de diferentes regiões do país estiveram presentes, tornando este encontro ainda mais especial. O entusiasmo e a troca de experiências mostraram o quanto a comunidade SAP na nossa região está crescendo e se fortalecendo ano após ano.
Cada edição desse evento supera expectativas, e desta vez não foi diferente. Sem dúvidas foi excelete.

A todos que participaram e contribuíram para esse momento incrível: muito obrigado! Seguimos juntos, evoluindo e construindo uma comunidade cada vez mais conectada e inovadora.
Nos vemos no próximo encontro!

entry.title: Re: How to separate the string for a query column custom...
entry.content:
Hi @IDimitrov ,

I'm afraid this is not achievable within SAP, as it seems to be a UI limitation.

If you have the result of a query displayed somewhere else, where HTML is accepted (like Crystal Reports), I think you might be able to use line break tags to achieve that (<br>).

BR,
Felipe

Do candidate need to fill in information again (just like the account create page) & accept DPCS? or after login, candidate account will be automatically created?

Thank you in advance!
Samantha

entry.title: Re: Cumulative, Opening balance calculation SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

To set cumulative key figures at the reporting level in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, follow these simple steps:

1. What Are Cumulative Key Figures?

 

Cumulative key figures show values that add up over time. For example, instead of showing just the sales for each month, a cumulative key figure would show the total sales up to that month.

 

2. Define the Cumulative Key Figure in Your Report

 

  • In your reporting tool (like SAP Analytics Cloud or S/4HANA Cloud), find the key figure you want to make cumulative.
  • Set it to Cumulative so that it keeps adding values together instead of just showing them for individual periods (like months or years).

 

 

3. Make Sure Time Is Set Up Correctly

Cumulative key figures depend on time, so make sure you have a time dimension (like months or quarters) in your report. This helps the system know when to add the numbers together.

 

 

4. Create the Calculation for Running Totals

  • You might need to use a function like CUMULATE() in your tool (like SAC) to calculate the running totals automatically.
  • This makes sure that the numbers continue to add up as time goes on.

 

 

5. Check Your Report

After setting the key figures as cumulative, review your report. Make sure the numbers are adding up over time as expected, and adjust the time period if needed.

In short: Set your key figure to cumulative, ensure you’re using a time dimension, and make sure the calculation keeps adding the values over time.

 

I hope those elements will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

#GenAI was used to help generate this content

entry.title: Re: How do setup IAS login page for Onboardee and SSO pag...
entry.content: Hi Jason You can probably use two variables as Soma mentioned. I'm using just one. SET OPTION PUBLIC.login_procedure=''

entry.title: Re: Unable to Subscribe to the Multi-tenant application in BTP Dashboard due to Dependency Error
entry.content:
Hi gregorw,

I have created a Multi tenant SAAS application (Non-CAP NodeJS based) and have deployed this app to SAP BTP in the Provider subaccount. Along with the application I have the saas-registry instance and xsuaa instance created in my Provider subaccount. I am also able to subscribe to this application from the Consumer subaccount.


Current Status: So far, I have successfully implemented application subscription from tenant subaccounts using the saas-registry and an xsuaa instance. I’ve also implemented the necessary logic for subscribe and unsubscribe events in the backend.

Note: This is a pure backend application, and I am not using an Approuter, as there is no frontend component involved. The application is intended to be consumed by tenant-specific backend or frontend apps via API calls.

Problems:

  1. When I subscribe app in consumer subaccount, the xsuaa instance (using tenant-mode as "shared in provider subaccount) is not automatically created in consumer subaccount.
  2. To address this, I added event for getting dependencies while subscribing in backend the code is shown in below picture.

     

  3. Also added "url" for "getDependencies" in "appUrls" and dependencies detail in SaaS configuration file as shown below.

     

  4. After these changes, I tried subscribing to the app again from the consumer subaccount got an error shown below.

     

Asking for Suggestions:

  1. How can I achieve the automatic creation of an XSUAA instance in the consumer subaccount when subscribing to the app, to ensure full isolation between consumer subaccounts?
  2. If not then how can I achieve independent OAuth 2.0 Authentication for tenants specific to their subaccount?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content: Escaped ! , Thank you for the fun challenge @sheenamk

entry.title: Set Default GL account in AIAB distribution rule for AUC settlement
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We wanted to know if there is some configuration available to set the default GL account in AIAB distribution rule.

As of now we need to select the Account assignment category and then the GL account manually.

However, if the scenario is to enter the same GL account for all AUC settlement cases then can we default the GL account (For each Asset class may be) in distribution rule so that user dont need to enter the GL account for each Asset.?

Thank you

Sumant

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Task Center: Innovations and Updates
entry.content:
Hi @Yumnahabbasi ,

Thanks for the blog.

 
Regards
Mauricio

entry.title: how to maintain PS master record for commitment item ?
entry.content: how to maintain because error came up and states does not exist.

entry.title: Re: Why does Cloud ALM not have the Central Finance Activ...
entry.content:
Hi, jeromerister,
I am going through unanswered posts and I hope you found your solution prior to now but in case not or in case others have similar question, I wanted to reply.

In the SAP for Me Process Navigator, I can see Central Finance maps to 3W1 and 1W4 for S/4HANA Public Cloud:

In checking Cloud ALM's Manage Scopes > Create and in Solution Scenario, I scroll down to SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and activate it:

Fill the title/description and save.

Then, I am able to search for 3W1 and find it there:

Can also search/find 1W4:

I hope this is helpful to you.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: A learning item is still in the section for you today...
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: A learning item is still in the section for you today...
entry.content: Hi, I experience a similar issue

entry.title: Re: A learning item is still in the section for you today...
entry.content: Sorry about the two short comments, my PC froze a bit. I have a similar issue where an item has been added to the learning history, but it is still on the frontpage "Recommended for you". When I click on the item I get the following message "The Item is not in your Learning Plan or Library" so why is it still on the dashboard? Was there any solution if a ticket was raised?

entry.title: Texts of Hierarchical Nodes not shown in Sap Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Expert.

I have created an Analytical Model, where some fields of it have Hierarchies with Directories. Through Associations and Semantics, I have linked texts (Descriptions) and Hierarchies to these fields. Nevertheless, when I try to visualize data, I find an issue: hierarchies are available and correctly selectable (as expected), texts of leaf nodes of these hierarchies are available (as expected), but, for some reason which I totally ignore, texts of the non leaf nodes are not available. I need to understand why these texts are not resolved as expected.

I hope to have been able to explain correctly the context

Thanks in advance for your help

Regards

Maffio

entry.title: Re: How to separate the string for a query column custom...
entry.content: Thank you. A rather disappointing lack of a very common sought after feature, but at least you're saving me another several hours of searching + trial&error as a novice with SQL.

entry.title: Re: SAP CLOUD ALM - Impact of Closing a Defect on the Tes...
entry.content: Dear Brad, since an answer was provided to your question and you kudoed it, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula Augedah

entry.title: Re: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content: Ah I see. For this particular example, I don't think there is a process that syncs this information. Job Information stores a reference (object ID) to the employee's job classification, but any field changes in the Job Classification object will not have an impact on Job Info.

entry.title: Re: Multi Level Advanced Intercompany Sales information S...
entry.content:
Hi,

the Advanced Intercompany Sales process in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public edition is covered with scope item 5D2. Please check the description of the process in process navigator in SAP For Me.

Regards,

Doreen

entry.title: Re: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content: Sorry, my response posted too soon. If you have an onSave rule in Job Info that sets the pay grade field (i.e. Set Job Information.Pay Grade.Value to be equal to Job Information.Job Classification.Pay Grade") then this will happen when you save changes to an employee's Job Information, but not when you save the Job Classification object. Can you reach out to whoever configured your instance and set up the Job Information data model and the business rules?

entry.title: Re: React Development with SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
if we don't have the managed app router in subaccount service market places what can i do that 
any help will be apricated

entry.title: Re: Material-dependent delivery confirmation
entry.content:
I am assuming Frozen food products have a dedicated Shipping Point. 

In that case, for delivering only on Mondays, Wednesdays and Fridays, you can assign Calendar to Frozen Foods Shipping which has only Mondays, Wednesdays and Fridays as working days. 

For the cut-oof time for the Order (12 noon), I need to check. I am not sure of standard solution, may be a small code in one of the Sales Order User Exit may be needed. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Empty parameters after saving JSON for binding creati...
entry.content:
Hello Uwe,

SAP is very heterogenous. Cloud ALM seems to have a very very basic handling of service instance parameters.

A better example for this step (thanks @gregorw) can be found in the "SAP Process Integration Runtime". You can select parameters from a value help and you can easily change them later on. Wonderful!

Here a short walk through - it would be really nice if also the Cloud ALM team would follow this golden standard 🙂

entry.title: Re: HanaDB Instance in Free tier deleted, now I cannot delete the service
entry.content:
@AlexPJ

Well, I may try that at some point, but the subaccount contains other spaces that are not ready to go.

I will try to delete the space first, see what happens. For now a second space has been created in the same subaccount with a new Free HanaDB, so at least the developers aren't stuck!

entry.title: Re: How to fetch the data from a page in SAC dashboard fo...
entry.content:
Hi Colleague,
The requirement is to fetch the data programmatically so at the runtime,we can utilize this data for AI infusion purpose.
For any charts or widgets, I get the OnClick event but there are limitations and I got many errors for the javascript code.
I cannot directly use the data from db as it will require api endpoints to fetch the data.
Need your valuable inputs.

entry.title: "E-Mail Notifications" for bank advanced bank account review
entry.content:
How to Set-up email notification for bank account review process.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: "E-Mail Notifications" for bank advanced bank account...
entry.content:
Choose the workflow scenario Bank Account Review in the App Manage Workflow for Bank Accounts to create Deadline for Sending Email Notification.

Refer the screenshot on the SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3605941

entry.title: SAP CPQ Promotions issue with quantity break limits and applicable discount
entry.content:
I have a promotion on an item with quantity breaks. It is common practice and my understanding that the beginning limit is inclusive and the ending limit is exclusive. However, it doesn't seem to be the case in my test.

 

The two quantity breaks are 0-10 QTY with 0% discount and, 10-20 QTY with 30% discount. When I add the promotion with QTY 10, the 30% discount is not applied, but it should as it is in the bracket. Adding the promotion with 11 items works as expected.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ Promotions issue with quantity break limits a...
entry.content:
Since you have applied the quantity break for 0-10 QTY with 0% discount, it means that for quantities less than or equal to 10, 0% discount will be applied.

And for quantities from 11-20, 30% discount will be applied.

 

Please look at the Scale Example in this help page: Promotions | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Multiple partners partners assigned to single condition contract in ReFX
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an internal staff contract that includes multiple business partners (employees) assigned to it. We have maintained the posting parameters for each partner assignment. We are currently assigning the business partner. but in the condition tab tab is there an option to assign all business partners under a single condition type rather than multiple conditions for the same cost?

Best Regards,

Sridhar

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2504
entry.content:
With the latest release (2504) for SAP Central Business Configuration, an exciting new feature is available. This blog post will provide you with an overview.

Optimized Workflow for Rebase

In the fast-paced world of business process management, clarity is key. If you're utilizing the parallel line in your operations, there's a new feature designed to streamline your workflow. The Configure Your Business Processes app now includes an Exempted from Rebase filter. This provides an easy way for identifying configuration activities that are exempt from the rebase operation and require manual rework.

Exempted from Rebase filter in the Configure Your Business Processes app

For a quick summary, check out this video about What's New in 2504. Don’t forget to also use the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal, which provides further details and links about all the recent changes.

That wraps up the new features this time. Did you like this blog? If so, please leave us a thumbs up at the top. Also, make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have any ideas on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the SAP Customer Influence platform to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

entry.title: Trying to find a field from B1 Journal Entry in a table of HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone. I am writing this to ask for some help finding a field in HANA that I can see in B1 when creating a journal entry.

 

I have activated "see system information" option, and when I try to see what that "Origen" field says, it says:
Origen -> [Form=392 Item=20 Pane=0]
Origen (box where you have data) -> [Form=392 Item=24 Pane=0 Variable=66]

I've tried to search for it in either OJDT or JDT1 but haven't found it. Anyone can tell me in which table can I find that data?

entry.title: Re: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content: Thank you for the information. I'm going to run this by our EC consultant and check our OnSave rules.

entry.title: Re: Data getting erased in quickmodel of signavio(using p...
entry.content:
Hi Kantrice,                                           

I try to create case for this ,but couldn't able to create case for it ,since it is asking to choose customer,whereas no entries found in the selection of customer.

regards,

Yokesh

entry.title: Any option to auto Approve/Reject a PO in My Inbox in sap Public cloud based on a custom field value
entry.content:
We have created a Purchase Order (PO) approval workflow using SAP Build Process Automation (SBPA) to handle all validations and approvals. However, in the final step, we encountered a limitation: the API does not allow us to directly change the PO status to “Approved” or “Rejected” as confirmed in the post : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/whether-the-purchase-order-can-be-approved-through-the-api/qaq-p/12341295

To work around this, we are using the Flexible Workflow in S/4HANA Public Cloud. The PO remains in “In Approval” status until the SBPA process is complete. Once all approvals in SBPA are done, we send a PATCH call to update a custom field in the PO.

In the Flexible Workflow, we’ve implemented a BADI : SWF_CHECK_ACTION_ALLOWED that checks the value of this custom field when the user click on any action from My Inbox. If the field shows that the SBPA process is complete, we allow the user to approve the PO in S/4HANA.

Now, we want to further improve this by automating the approval in S/4HANA without requiring manual user action.

Our question:
Is there a way to automatically approve the PO in the Flexible Workflow/ My Inbox once the custom field is updated from SBPA?

or

Can we use any BADI or other method/Jobs to approve the PO in My Inbox in S4 public cloud, without requiring a user to log in and manually approve it in S/4HANA? or is there a possibility to use a certain CDS with behavior definition exposed as an API allowing to change the status of the PO which is read only currently in the API: https://api.sap.com/api/CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001/overview.

Thank you in Advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: How to remove the left/right margin?
entry.content: Thank you so much!

entry.title: Re: how to maintain PS master record for commitment item ?
entry.content: For Projects assigned PRs and POs automatically create commitments.  You can also manually create commitments via funds management FMZ1.

entry.title: Re: Data getting erased in quickmodel of signavio(using p...
entry.content:
Good day Yok1,

Did you need additional assistance or have another question?

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: SAP BI Launchpad Load Balancer URL not working in Microsoft Edge browser after upgrading BI to 4.3
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We Upgraded our BI servers from version 4.2 to 4.3. After the upgrade, the load balancer URL for BI Launchpad giving the error 'Microsoft Internet Explorer 11 and other legacy browsers are no longer supported. For more information, see Internet Explorer 11 will no longer be supported by various SAP UI technologies in newer releases'. The strange thing is that the CMC URL works and the individual url for both the servers works with SSO for the BI Launchpad. The Edge browser we have is Microsoft Edge for Browser Version 134.0.3124.93.
 
Does anyone know on why this happens or how to resolve this?
 
Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: Re: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/securi...
entry.content: Hi syedijlalayub, can you shared your solution, please?

entry.title: Problem with authorization objects in G/L account balances
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to run S_ALR_87009815, but I always get error Message No. KM142.

When I look at the authorization check, it says K_PCA needs a * permission. The report should work, because the permission for the G/L accounts, Company codes, ... are assigned correctly and work for other transactions.

Is there a workaround for this problem? Or a BAPI that can be used?

entry.title: SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: SAP and Databricks open a bold new era of data and AI - BDC2767
entry.content:
At this year’s SAP Sapphire, I’m excited to share groundbreaking innovations that are changing the way organizations leverage data. Join me to explore how SAP and Databricks are coming together to transform enterprise data strategies and accelerate the path to AI.

📅 Session Details:

Title:
Unleashing the Value of Business Data with SAP Business Data Cloud and Databricks

When:

  • Tuesday, May 20 – 2:00 PM to 2:20 PM
  • Wednesday, May 21 – 1:30 PM to 1:50 PM

Where:
SAP Sapphire – Session Link

What You’ll Learn:

SAP and Databricks announced a landmark partnership back in February that will redefine how applications and data platforms work together. From curated SAP data products to zero-copy integration, this session will show how SAP Databricks within the SAP Business Data Cloud solution empowers data professionals to:

  • Accelerate the development and deployment of AI models and data applications
  • Unlock trusted, business-context-rich data without duplication
  • Seamlessly connect SAP data to the Databricks Lakehouse Platform
  • Deliver real-time, intelligent insights that drive value across the enterprise

Whether you're responsible for data strategy, analytics, or innovation, this session will equip you with actionable insights to elevate your organization’s data capabilities.

Co-Speaker: I am excited to be joined by former colleague and longtime friend Brian Suk, a Senior Solutions Architect at Databricks.

About Me: Kara Reed
I’m a Senior Director of Product Marketing at SAP, where I focus on helping organizations adopt and maximize the value of SAP Business Data Cloud and other cloud-based data solutions. Over the past 14 years at SAP, I’ve held a variety of roles in the Data & Analytics organization, most recently on the Retail Solution Management team. I work closely with customers and industry leaders to guide our go-to-market strategies and support the data transformation journey.

The fun doesn't stop there! Check out these other sessions to learn more about this game changing partnership and the value SAP Databricks within SAP Business Data Cloud brings!

An architect’s guide: SAP Business Data Cloud and SAP Databricks solutions - BDC2633

  • Tuesday, May 20 1:00-1:30

SAP Databricks: Simplify analytics and AI for your SAP software data - PAR1122 – customer success story

  • Tuesday, May 20 1:30-1:50

How Baker Hughes modernizes its applications with SAP Business Data Cloud - BDC3260 – customer success story

  • Tuesday, May 20 2:30-2:50

Unlock the potential of AI with the SAP Databricks solution - PAR1123 – customer success story

  • Wednesday, May 21 11:00-11:20

Can't make it to SAP Sapphire? No problem! Follow along the tags and topic pages below to stay up to date on the latest SAP data and analytics news!

Tags: Data and Analytics SAP Datasphere SAP Business Data Cloud

Topic pages:  Data and Analytics  SAP Business Data Cloud  SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: BTP fiori and odata v1
entry.content: The answer is that when calling to the BYD analytics service to get report data you need to make sure to disable batch calls.

entry.title: Combining Freight order according to carrier for Printout
entry.content:
Hi,

We are doing greenfield implementation of S4 HANA 2023. We do not have advance TM but basic embedded TM.

The requirement is to print a note to carrier which contains all freight orders on the day with different ship to party. They do it for each carrier. So, a single printout containing all freight orders with same carrier but different ship to. The print contains basic details of all freight orders like number, ship to, quantity etc

I checked but could not find any standard way to do that. Read about the consignment order but it is I believe in advance TM. Is there a standard way to achieve this.

If not, I was thinking about custom methods. Freight order lists are there in Freight order worklist app, pick according to the carrier and collate it in a custom pdf created for the purpose. 

 Is there any other app which allows you to take collective print of FO.

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Christof,

Thanks for sharing the information. What is basic difference between DPG and BW connection (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/e589041e80264f43b6c209c407336376.html?locale=en-US)  in Datasphere with respect to BW 7.5 as a source to BDC? In terms of supportibility both support same BW objects. Is the difference only that  DPG sends data to Object storage?

 

Regards,

Viren

entry.title: Re: Supplier or Customer Master Data Upload using Migration Cockpit
entry.content: Just wondering if you have populated the Address-Independant Communication section while loading Supplier info using the Migration cockpit?

entry.title: Re: Include Header row in subsequent pages is not working for adobe header repetition issue
entry.content: Can you please share also an "Hierarchy" (tree on the left) - mainly the top part?

entry.title: Re: Bereitstellung der Formulare für die Deutsche Umsatzsteuer-Voranmeldung/Jahresmeldung 2021 in SA
entry.content:
Hallo, ich kann auflösen 🙂 wir hatten den Hinweis manuell heruntergeladen und aus FOTV Stylesheet importiert. (SNOTE war zu diesem Zeitpunkt nicht funktionstüchtig.) Damit waren aber die FB noch nicht aktualisiert.

Wir haben nun den Hinweis per SNOTE eingebaut und damit waren auch alle Erweiterungen aktuell.
